  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/programData/getLastModifiedDateForProgram/{programId}/{versionId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

>

  parameters={[{"name":"programId","in":"path","description":"programId that you want the last modified date for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},{"name":"versionId","in":"path","description":"versionId that you want the last modified date for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}

>
